title: ononis natrix var. picta
intro: Ononis natrix var. picta, also known as the Painted Rest-harrow or Painted Bedstraw, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Ononis natrix var. picta include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating menstrual cramps. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can be used topically to promote healing and internally to support overall well-being.
